entry.title: Re: How can I use a range as a filter in cds views
entry.content:
Hi, 

Try these steps-

 

  • Define the CDS view with parameters for the date range.

        Example:

         

  • Use the parameters in the WHERE clause to filter the data based on the date range.

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Code Activation and Full Stack Application Development
entry.content:
Nice blog!
I can subscribe to this app, but I can't find these two role collections: "Build Code Administrator" and "Build Code Developer." Do you know what the problem is? I appreciate your help.

entry.title: SAP CodeJam HANA ML in Berlin 2024-06 Recap
entry.content:
On the last Friday of June, we held the Getting Started with Machine Learning using SAP HANA and Python in Berlin, Germany.

It was kindly hosted by Zalando and organized by @rofinke 

It was a mix of some theory...

...and hands-on.

It was great to have the product manager responsible for the SAP HANA embedded Machine Learning @ChristophMorgen with us.

 

I would like to extend special thanks to @oliver for organizing and all participants joining SAP Stammtisch Berlin for the day before...


...that I used as well to walk and to see the city...

...including the former Berlin Wall.

Would you like to host such an SAP CodeJam? Here are the details: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/quot-getting-started-with-machine-learning-usin...

entry.title: Re: Acquiring Core ABAP Skills / Solutions and Templates...
entry.content:
I am connected to the following ABAP system (with the provided JSON Key): 

TRL_EN(TRL 100, CB9980006404, EN)

entry.title: BAPI TO POST LOW STOCK CHECK DURING /SCWM/TO_CONFIRM
entry.content:
Hello experts,

We need to confirm Warehouse Task from an external system. As there is no API available, we decided to create a wrapper around unreleased FM  /SCWM/TO_CONFIRM.

Additionally, we have a requirement to trigger Low Stock Check during the TO Confirmation.


Is there a BAPI to trigger low stock check during /SCWM/TO_CONFIRM (Function module run)?

Regards,

AJ

entry.title: Convergent Charging - Reference Start
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I need some help understanding a situation I'm encountering in CC. I'm trying to use the "Reference Start" parameter to generate a recurrence. However, the date for this parameter is not being updated when the contract undergoes versioning.


For example: Contract versioned:

Reference Start remains at 31-05-2024. Fields: Creation Date - Reference Start, Recurring Start - Reference Stop - Recurring Stop

Has anyone else experienced this issue? Could you assist with this case?

Thank you.

entry.title: Access Columns in SAC
entry.content:
Hi!

How do I ensure that a person has access to the stories in SAC, can import files with data, but in the model does not have access to the read and write column (can't change anything)? That is, they cannot change what is in these columns.

entry.title: Re: More Flexible Conditions to Trigger a Workflow
entry.content:
We are upgrading to v2023 Cloud Private Edition and looking for this exact scenario - adding profit center as a start condition in JE verification. The Custom Fields and Logic App (F1481) has been deprecated in v2023 so I am using the Custom Logic App (F6957). The code is in a screen shot where you cannot copy and paste and some of the characters are fuzzy and difficult to read. I am receiving a syntax error in the code from step 8 and not able to get it to work. Also the code from step 4 is passing test but still indicating errors with red lines. Could you please review? Much appreciated.

STEP 4:

* condition id - value to be changed
CONSTANTS: co_id TYPE if_swf_flex_ifs_condition_def=>ty_condition_id VALUE 'CL_SWF_FLEX_IFS_BADI_COND_SAMP' ##NO_TEXT.

ct_condition = VALUE #(
( id = co_id
subject = 'Profit Center'(001)
type = if_swf_flex_ifs_condition_def=>cs_condtype-start_step
)
).

ct_parameter = VALUE #(
( id = co_id
name = 'Profit Center'(002)
xsd_type = if_swf_flex_ifs_condition_def=>cs_xstype-integer
mandatory = abap_true
service_path = '/sap/opu/odata/sap/FAC_GL_JOURNALENTRY_VER_SRV'
entity = 'FAC_VerifyGJE_Workflow_VH'
property = 'ProfitCenter'
)
).

STEP 8:

READ TABLE it_parameter_value INTO DATA(ls_param_value)
INDEX 1.
IF sy-subrc <> 0 OR ls_param_value-value IS INITIAL.
*parameter is defined as mandatory
RAISE EXCEPTION TYPE cx_ble_runtime_error.
ENDIF.

TRY.
lv_profitcenter_cond = ls_param_value-value.
CATCH cx_root INTO DATA(lx_exc) ##CATCH_ALL.
RAISE EXCEPTION TYPE cx_ble_runtime_error
EXPORTING
previous = lx_exc.
ENDTRY.

lv_belnr = is_sap_object_node_type-sont_key_part_1+0(10).
lv_bukrs = is_sap_object_node_type-sont_key_part_1+10(4).
lv_gjahr = is_sap_object_node_type-sont_key_part_1+14(4).

SELECT * FROM c_gljrnlentryitemtobeverified
WHERE sourcecompanycode = @LV_bukrs AND accountingdocument = @LV_belnr AND fiscalyear = @LV_gjahr
INTO TABLE @DATA(lt_item).

LOOP AT lt_item INTO DATA(ls_item).
IF ls_item-profitcenter CS lv_profitcenter_cond.
cv_is_true = abap_true.
ENDIF.
ENDLOOP.

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content: Greetings from Chicago. I've been working in the SAP Security space since 2010 and looking forward to sharing some of my knowledge and experience!

entry.title: Not able to consume Datasphere objects in sac in datasphere Trial account
entry.content: Not able to consume Datasphere objects in sac in data sphere Trial account Created a Graphical model (analytical dataset) with consumption switch on.

entry.title: XK02 -FLGDEFAULT does not coincide with ADR6-FLGDEFAULT
entry.content:
Hi all:

We have at least one case where the record that indicates the default email address (FLGDEFAULT) in ADR6 does not coincide with the info show in XK02 (Vendor detail).

XK02 shows, as a default address, the number 002 record:

But, if I check the ADR6 table, I get the following info:

We have already checked and LFA1-ADRNR coincides with ADR6-ADDRNUMBER.

Any ideas?

TIA,

Luis

entry.title: Re: Restrict another Notification/Maintenance order
entry.content: Hi @mohit1234 are you using S/4HANA Cloud or Onpremise for Plant Maintenance ?

entry.title: Revenue Recognition - Accrual Method 5
entry.content:
If using "Accrual Method 5 - Recognize on Invoice" for invoiced revenue, only the exchange rate from the day the invoice was posted is considered.
Does this mean the amount moved to deferred revenue will be transferred back to revenue correctly and avoid errors?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Revenue Recognition - Accrual Method 5
entry.content:
To check how "Accrual Method 5 - Recognize on Invoice" works, a Revenue Recognition test run can be performed.
This method only considers the invoice value on the posting date. If we switch to this method, the deferred revenue will be cleared.

entry.title: Re: How to get ISO number on the quality certificate,
entry.content: Please create a Master Inspection Characteristic and maintain the information of the ISO Number

entry.title: Re: Questions re: "Multi-model with SAP HANA Cloud" developer challenge
entry.content:
I am facing a strange issue. From Week3_1, here the execution is stuck for almost several minutes and after that nothing executes. Not able to understand what's wrong.

After this, nothing executes not even print('Hello BAS') -

entry.title: Re: RAP Create button still enabled after disabling the f...
entry.content:
Hi there,

try using the annotation @ui.createHidden: true to hide the create button in addition to using global feature control to disable the operation.

This annotation is an entity annotation, that means in CDS view it goes above 

define view entity...

and in metadata extension, above

annotate view xxx with { ..

Hope this helps.

Regards,
Jessie

entry.title: Re: Situation Handling Safety Stock
entry.content:
Hi @Marius23,

Based on your description, it seems we don't have any pre-delivered use cases that cover that scenario. Here's a list of the pre-delivered Situation Handling use cases in SAP S/4HANA Cloud: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/a630d57fc5004c6383e7a81efee7a8bb/fdbf5eabf0e84621a15c6965b3e01649.html

Alternatively, you might want to explore the extended framework of Situation Handling for modeling this use case. For more details on creating custom situation use cases, check out this blog post series published by our team: https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/how-to-start-with-custom-situations-high-level-design-of-the-use-case-1-4/ba-p/13578044

Kind regards,

Ana

entry.title: Re: How to create a Notification or a Situation when a In...
entry.content:
Hi @SJlearner7861,

Are you using the extended framework to model this situation? If so, could you provide more details about the issues you've encountered?

Kind regards,

Ana

entry.title: Well this annotation provides a syntax error. Since which ABAP version it is available?
Re: its possible create SAP notes?
entry.content: You can't directly create a note.sar file from Cofiles and Data. However, you can generate a transport request to apply changes. To create a note, you'll need to follow the SAP Note Assistant process in your system. Hope this helps!

entry.title: Abap erro SD059 Documentation does not exist
entry.content:
Hello to all , i have a problem with my z report , when it runs indialog is fine but when it runs in background it give me this error

 

 

SD0059 

But i made 3 different documentation in 3 languages and still de same eror , i don't think it is like this , any suggestion please ??

entry.title: Re: Why I can't delete Project demand resource?
entry.content:
Hi @Dylan2 

You cannot delete a demand which is in Requested or Closed status

This is documented on the online Resource :

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/f369b2eff700401494ba6e7c9a573288/852df7e0a5d748deb52b1dc9c2baa4e0.html

 

Maybe archiving it using  /S4PPM/PRO

Best Regards

Enda

entry.title: Re: Assistance Required: Retrieving Business Partner Full Name in S/4 Hana Public Edition via SO API
entry.content: adding tag SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Sales

entry.title: Re: Purchase Requisition Email Notification template setting
entry.content: adding tag S/4HANA Cloud for Sourcing and Procurement

entry.title: Re: Print Form Adaptation in Sales/Service 2: Get XML data for preview in Adobe LiveCycle Designer
entry.content:
@Felix_Wyskocil Again a very nice "tips & trick" post on PDF but in V2. Supercool. Thanks for it.

I wish they can make this "renderForm" technique applicable for all services(incl. Lead or Survey) in C4C V2. OR at least start putting your debug sheet into the standard system which can serve as a way to capture the PDF data at runtime (not for PROD system of course).

PS: I recently used your PDF debug sheet for V1, for troubleshooting an issue and I can't tell you how easy it was to capture the data at runtime(without waiting for someone at SAP to provide me XML form data from backend)

best
Saurabh

entry.title: Re: International Trade : PRODCOM in S4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi @3070856 

 

An app for PRODCOM is not available in Cloud . instead customers use the apps 

mentioned in the KBA https://me.sap.com/notes/2432527

like "Manage Commodity Codes" and "Classify Products – Commodity Codes"

 

Best Regards

Enda

entry.title: Re: Cleared in the meantime"error message
entry.content: Hi Pyae, It looks like the payload is incorrect based on this error message. Please review the sample code provided (halfway through the page) on https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/b978f98fc5884ff2aeb10c8fdeb8a43b/5142cdd767b04122a8beb6ecd460a922.html

entry.title: Re: Learning Journey – Retail Industry
entry.content:
### Exciting News: New E-learning Courses on SAP Learning Hub!

Attention all SAP business users and implementation consultants! We're thrilled to introduce two new E-learning courses available now on the SAP Learning Hub focused on SAP Omnichannel Promotion Pricing (SAP OPP).

1. **SAP Omnichannel Promotion Pricing - Overview**:
Dive deep into the functionalities and strategic applications of SAP OPP. This course offers a comprehensive overview, integrating scenarios, and tips on positioning SAP OPP effectively in the market.
- **Course ID:** ICOPP1_EN_Col01

2. **SAP Omnichannel Promotion Pricing - Basic Setup**:
Get hands-on with the essential steps to set up SAP Omnichannel Promotion Pricing efficiently. This course is perfect for getting started and handling basic configurations.
- **Course ID:** ICOPP2_EN_Col01

Both courses are designed to enhance your understanding and skills with SAP OPP, ensuring you leverage the software to its full potential. They provide rich content suited for those new to SAP OPP as well as seasoned users looking to refresh or enhance their knowledge.

Log in to your SAP Learning Hub account, find these courses under My Learning/Library, and self-assign them to start boosting your expertise today!

Stay ahead in the game with SAP Learning Hub – your go-to for mastering SAP solutions!

entry.title: Re: Submissions for "SAP HANA Cloud multi-model" developer challenge: Week 3 - Image Embed
entry.content: @Vitaliy-R here is the 3rd week submission, I want to revisit for more challenge.

entry.title: How to get actual GST applicable for the material using ABAP?
entry.content:
Hi,

  I would like to know GST applied to the material code using ABAP. I would like to understand tables from where I can get actual rate e.g. 18% or 12%. I tried searching blogs and as per suggestions checked tax classification using MLAN, TAKM etc. tables but all entries showing 0 value. Is there any way I can find actual rate as 18% etc. As classification based on country code there could be export material also.

Regards,

PD

entry.title: Re: SAP Commercial project management availability in S/4...
entry.content: Start learning about Public Cloud Enterprise Projects here:

entry.title: Re: SAP Commercial project management availability in S/4...
entry.content: Start learning about Public Cloud Enterprise Projects here:https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/f369b2eff700401494ba6e7c9a573288/97e2a4e0c9954d519ae3c862d7b7f8ac.html

entry.title: How to create Z scales for rate tables in TM that can evaluate the material item group in TM
Re: Learning Journey – Public Sector Industry
entry.content:
Welcome to our latest addition to the SAP Learning Hub: E-learning courses focused on Financial Contract Accounting (FI-CA), SAP Public Sector Collections and Disbursements (SAP PSCD), and SAP Tax and Revenue Management (SAP TRM).

Enhance your expertise in the financial domain with our carefully curated Learning Journey including several new courses designed for both business users and implementation consultants. Dive into course options like BR240, IPS510, IPS500, and IPS520 which encompass a range of topics from collection and disbursement to tax administration processes.

Choose from flexible learning formats such as E-books, E-learning modules, and in-depth Learning Classes spanning from 1 to 5 days. Our practice systems allow hands-on experience and self-assessment tests help gauge your understanding effectively.

Do not miss out on these comprehensive courses to boost your SAP knowledge and skills. Enroll today in the SAP Learning Hub and take your first step in mastering Financial Contract Accounting and Tax Management!

Check out the Public Sector Learning Journey (https://help.sap.com/learning-journeys/50021faf7a2610149a0e8d3b2b2278ca) for detailed course offerings and embark on your e-learning expedition now!

Public Sector SAP Public Sector Collection and Disbursement SAP S/4HANA

entry.title: Re: full solr indexing in local - Indexer worker failed....
entry.content:
The exception is due to your product data. You need to remove corrupted products from database, or ignore errors during indexing.

Caused by: java.lang.NullPointerException: Cannot invoke "de.hybris.platform.core.model.ItemModel.getPk()" because "itemModel" is null
at de.hybris.platform.solrfacetsearch.indexer.impl.DefaultIndexer.indexItems(DefaultIndexer.java:206) ~[solrfacetsearchserver.jar:?]

entry.title: Re: Save the Date for Our Exclusive SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 Early Release Series!
entry.content:
Hi @maria_silipo,

When I get into the Learning Hub, I get the message "This offering is not available or may not be part of an edition of SAP Learning Hub that you have access to. Please click here to download an overview of all current content per edition."
Do you know what's the problem?

BR
Matt

entry.title: Re: Advanced Intercompany Sales in SAP S/4HANA OP/Private Cloud
entry.content:
We are using the Intercompany advanced sales (5D2) model in the Brazil location, so each invoice must generate a Fiscal Note.
In the 5D2 model you have to change the center in the sales order to that of the delivering company and this center is taken by the delivery and client invoice.
However, in the Brazilian location, the center is assigned 1 to 1 with the "local de negocio", having the center of the delivering company assigned, the fiscal note is being created with a "local de negocio" of the delivering company, and it must be a "local de negocio" of the selling company

Any ideas on how to change the plant on the customer invoice?

entry.title: Re: Integration between sap service cloud version 2 with...
entry.content: You have to use api pacakages in Cloud Integration (CPI) to integrate C4C with CDC

entry.title: Re: How can we integration bi-directional flow of data fr...
entry.content:
With CPI iflow functionality , you should be able integrate S4 HANA SOAP Web service to CDC Webhooks

If you also have Commerce cloud in the landscape, think about integrating CDC with Commerce and then Commerce can replicate B2B and B2C with SAP CDC via Webhooks

CDP (Customer Data platform) is an optional thing in the landscape

entry.title: Re: App Title Issues in Central Launchpad with SAP Workzone Service
entry.content: can you explain that path a bit?

entry.title: Re: Why do SAP Customer Data Cloud (CDC) child sites not have the "Hosted Pages" feature?
entry.content: Just checking if this feature has been delivered

entry.title: Payment method details in outgoing bank transfer
entry.content:
Dear Sap Support,

Please clarify on how the payment method details are derived in an outgoing bank transfer.
Domestic / International bank transfer.

Is it based only on the payment methods in bank master ?
In case multiple methods are maintained how does the system identify Domestic or International payments?

Best regards


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Payment method details in outgoing bank transfer
entry.content:
Dear Customer, 

For more details, please check the Help Documents below:

Outgoing Bank Transfers — Configuration Guide

Bank Transfers
Best regards,  
Ihan
SAP Product Support
Community:
SAP Business ByDesign:
https://www.sap.com/community/topics/business-bydesign.html

entry.title: Re: Integration between sap service cloud version 2 with sap customer data cloud
entry.content: Hi Adrià, could you please share the specific integration scenarios? Meanwhile you can reference the Restful API Doc of service cloud version 2 here, https://api.sap.com/package/SAPSalesServiceCloudV2/rest

entry.title: Re: confirmed quantity still exists after goods issue
entry.content:
If you did the goods issue for the production order, you can check the withdraw the qty in T-code: COOIS

List: Components 

Production order:

then run the report, you can see the requirement Qty and withdraw Qty.

entry.title: Download information concerning system vailability
entry.content:
We would like to have the possibility to download or acces the data of the systems availability, so that we can expose it internally in our global dashboard. 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Download information concerning system vailability
entry.content: Please refer to KBA 2548400 - Getting started with the SAP Cloud Availability - SAP for Me

entry.title: Re: custom logic app need use function Module Read_text
entry.content:
Hi,

What parameters did you fill in?

entry.title: Confirmed POs not appearing in MRP Rescheduling Checks
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

We are currently in the process of implementing an S/4HANA Public Cloud. 

I have an experience an issue with exceptions reporting. Hope you could help me.

Say for a material there are PO lines with exceptions (e.g. Reschedule in, out, cancellations).

When you run the app 'Schedule MRP Rescheduling Checks', the order line exceptions appear on the list.

 

However, once you confirm the same order lines (via 'Manage Supplier Confirmation' app) without changing anything. And then running again 'Schedule MRP Rescheduling Checks'.  It will disappear from the  exceptions list.

 

Note that when you check Manage Material Coverage and MD04, it is still appearing as exceptions.

 

 

Has anyone encountered this issue before?

We still want to see confirmed orders that has exceptions but every time you confirmed an order, it gets excluded and the MRP element converts to ShpgNt.

 

Thank you,
Marc

entry.title: Re: Customer return - Data fro creating a delivery is inc...
entry.content:
Hi,

First, maybe what you want to ask about is the message number M7279?

I hope you have followed the message to check if your system settings are.

This problem is usually caused by a missing shipping setting.

entry.title: sap hana security
entry.content: How to configure network access restrictions for HANA database

entry.title: Create new entries in document classes in Sap S/4 Hana Cloud
entry.content:
Hello everyone.

When configuring the document classes, it does not allow entering new entries, only the default ones can be used. Is there a way to activate the new entries button?

Regards,

entry.title: Re: S4HANA Public Cloud_Order confirmation form_change ou...
entry.content: Hello, There are more steps in output parameter determination to control output items. Please check detail in the blog https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/control-sales-order-output-messages-in-s-4hana-ce/ba-p/12855158 Best regards, Yong

entry.title: Re: SAP Commercial project management availability in S/4...
entry.content: I have gone through SAP help however I can see there is no CPM functionality available in Cloud public edition. Thanks

entry.title: Re: S4HANA Public Cloud_Order confirmation form_change ou...
entry.content: Besides, Please go to SSCUI 101214 to enable change document output type for sales document.

entry.title: When creating a Purcahasing Catalog, is it possible to include Items from the Product master
entry.content:
When creating a Purcahasing Catalog, is it possible to include Items from the Product master in the catalog?
Or is Purcahasing Catalog a feature specific to non-stock items?

entry.title: datasphere exception - 2112401: Hostname 'www.googleapis.com;location' contains invalid characters.
entry.content:
SAP Datasphere we have a google big query connection with sap datasphere, it works fine in past 1 year. recently, after we renew the expired google certificate and validate the connection, it is broken with below error mess

I do some check with the connection settings itself, looks the UI screen changed with a new field called "location" add on top, which is not required previously.

either I leave this field as empty by default or give the value"US,EU" or "US" or "asia-south1,EU". it all doesn't work, but give the same error message as above;

I guess that this error might be due to an incorrect format of the server name. The hostname name should not contain ';location'.

since this issue show up recent day. I am wondering whether anything relevant with datasphere new feature release? is it a standard system behavior or a system issue? our connection now doesn't work any more.

welcome to comment and help. appreciate it!

entry.title: Re: Creating a Google Big Query connection in SAP Datasphere (DWC)
entry.content:
Hi Melinda @mellinda_pereira 

thanks for sharing.

we had a google big query connection with sap datasphere pretty same as your posted steps, it works fine in past 1 year. recently, after we renew the expired google certificate and validate the connection, it is broken.

looks like recently some new field added on top of connection details.

either I leave this field as empty by default or give the value"US,EU" or "US" or "asia-south1,EU". it all doesn't work, but give the error message around:

I guess that this error might be due to an incorrect format of the server name. The hostname name should not contain ';location'.

since this issue show up recent day. I am wondering whether anything relevant with datasphere new feature release? is it a standard system behavior or a system issue? our connection now doesn't work any more.

since no document mentioned this change,  could you share some insights about this changed settings and how it will effect the connection?

thanks

entry.title: Re: CDS Preview - Number of entries and rows retrieved do...
entry.content:
Hi,

Can I see the SQL you wrote? Where did the message appear from?

entry.title: Re: SAP PI Proxy to JDBC Scenario
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

 

I am able to receive the response using the select statement in receiver JDBC. However, I need to select the data in certain period like 10 minutes using the date field. 

Like if I give 02-07-2024 10:00:00 as input date for Select SQL statement then it should fetch data for next 10 minutes using the same date field which is 

Data between 02-07-2024 10:00:00 to 02-07-2024 10:10:00 

Please help.

entry.title: Re: Is there a Report or CDS View that can give details of list of Journal Entries billed as part of
entry.content: Thanks, Amith. I check view I_ActualPlanJournalEntryItemCube but could not find, though I see view I_ActualPlanJournalEntryItem. How to find I_ActualPlanJournalEntryItemCube view.

entry.title: Re: Creating a Google Big Query connection in SAP Datasphere (DWC)
entry.content: It's a bug https://me.sap.com/notes/0003489764

entry.title: Re: datasphere exception - 2112401: Hostname 'www.googleapis.com;location' contains invalid characte
entry.content: It's a bug: https://me.sap.com/notes/0003489764

entry.title: Re: SAP GUI Issue: The SAP animated focus does sometimes...
entry.content:
Hello @Dominik_J,

you have enabled Multi-monitor scaling awareness in your SAP Logon.

Here an example of an active user field with 125% scaling and enabled Multi-monitor scaling awareness. 

The focus is not correct.

With disabled Multi-monitor scaling awareness all works well.

Disable Multi-monitor scaling awareness and try it again. Let us know your result.

Best regards
Stefan

entry.title: Fetch the data between dates using select query in JDBC receiver
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

My requirement is REST to JDBC synchronous scenario using select query statement I need to pull data from database and send response back to REST API.

I have gone through the below article 

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/sap-pi-proxy-to-jdbc-scenario/ba-p/13326556

I am able to receive the response using the select statement in receiver JDBC. However, I need to select the data in certain period like 10 minutes using specific date field. 

Like if I give 02-07-2024 10:00:00 as input date for Select SQL statement then it should fetch data for next 10 minutes using the same date field which is 

Data between 02-07-2024 10:00:00 to 02-07-2024 10:10:00 

Please help.

entry.title: Usage decision with new warehouse task for final put away
entry.content:
Hello All,

Inspection lot is created after goods receipt, warehouse task is created based on condition records.

User will confirm the warehouse task and final put away is done in Quarantine bin.

now our requirement is once Usage decision is done then new warehouse task needs to be create updating stock type and new bin which is standard storage type.

I tried to create follow-up action with 1010 WPT but its creating new Warehouse task but from Quarantine to another quarantine bin.

we have updated the product with Quarantine Put away control indicator.

Please advise.

entry.title: Re: How to restrict the entries of a database table based on the user name
entry.content:
Why are you replying to a 14 year old question which is furthermore marked as solved?!

Beside that, please use the code format option in the editor if you post abap code here.

entry.title: GRC Tuesdays: Hidden Gems - Flexible Risk Management Workflow
entry.content:
Amongst the various GRC Tuesdays blog series, I think the “Hidden Gems” one is my favourite. Simply because it puts a spotlight on an existing functionality that has been created with great care by the Engineering team… but that wasn’t really announced so flew under the radar so to speak.

I feel these blogs give it the recognition it deserves, but it also helps organizations “discover” features and functionalities that they can use today without any additional investment and very little effort. A win-win situation!

Today, I’d like to focus on Flexible Risk Management Workflow.

Reading the 2024 Risk Management Information Systems Panorama published earlier in May by the French Association for the Management of Risks and Insurance in Companies (AMRAE), I noticed that “flexible and customizable” was once again cited as a GRC software challenge for many companies looking to “Think Big and Start Small” with their progressive extended capabilities added along the way.

From my experience, this is a key requirement for companies moving from a “Structured” Enterprise Risk Management maturity level to an “Optimized” one:

Enterprise Risk Management Maturity Levels

The feedback I often hear is that organizations would like their risk workflows to follow this maturity curve, and gradually include more steps as their risk users increasingly get more proficient.

Which brings me to my hidden gem today: did you know that there are dedicated customization options in SAP Risk Management that can help you tailor the risk assessment workflow steps you need, very simply and very rapidly?

 

Flexible Risk Assessment workflow

 

The risk assessment workflow is a key component of the SAP Risk Management solution. When triggered from the central Planner, it automatically sends out risk assessment work items to all associated risk owners and they can then provide their updates and insights directly via a guided wizard-type approach.

This risk assessment workflow is designed following the “Guided Activity Floorplan” (GAF) principle. In summary, this is a design template that takes the user through an activity, step-by-step. A guided activity is divided into a series of logical steps, each of which can be broken down further into substeps, and all of which represent tasks and subtasks of an activity. In our case, a risk assessment.

In SAP Risk Management, the standard risk assessment workflow can be composed of the following steps:

  • [optional] Review of the risk identification
  • [optional] Review of Key Risk Indicators and their values
  • [mandatory] Review of the risk analysis – this one you can’t turn off… otherwise the risk assessment won’t really be possible!
  • [optional] Review of the risk responses (effectiveness, mitigation effort, etc.)
  • [optional] Review of the attached documentation

As such, the organization could decide to start simple and only include the mandatory risk assessment step for the first exercise and progressively add more steps.

To do so, they would simply need to select/unselect the relevant flags in the dedicated customization activity (V_GRPCCUST1):

 

Scenario 1 – Early stages of risk maturity

 

Here, the organization is interested in regularly capturing information about risk assessments, but risk review (including documentation and responses) is either done during a workshop or an interview for instance.

What to select in the configuration activity:

  • Nothing additional! Only the risk assessment step will be prompted

Steps selected/unselected for this scenario:

Guided workflow activity received by the risk owner:

 

Scenario 2 – Structured risk management approach

 

Here, the organization decides to include a review of the risk identification, but also of the risk responses directly with the risk assessment workflow to ensure that any new causes or consequences are captured quickly and that the mitigation efforts are up-to-date so that there is no inconsistencies with the real risk exposure.

 What to select in the configuration activity:

  • ANALYSIS_GAF_GENERAL => this will include the existing risk identification information
  • ANALYSIS_GAF_MITIG => this will include all the risk responses assigned to the risk and their details

Steps selected/unselected for this scenario:

Guided workflow activity received by the risk owner:

 

Scenario 3 – Optimized risk management

 

As per the maturity curve above, formalized Key Risk Indicators is often a step not included in the early stages of the introduction of a risk management framework but rather introduced once the process is well established and runs smoothly.

Steps selected/unselected for this scenario:

Guided workflow activity received by the risk owner:

 

But that is not all, oh no, that is not all!

 

The good news is that you can decide when you want to activate these steps, and this decision is not final or irreversible. If the feedback from users is that this becomes too heavy to do during a risk assessment, you can always deactivate the steps, and trigger Risk Response or Key Risk Indicator update activities separately. Still from the central Planner of course:

These customization options therefore give companies flexibility to move along the maturity curve at their own speed, and even decide when to pause and possibly when to roll-back if needed.

I look forward to reading your thoughts and comments either on this blog or on Twitter @TFrenehard

And if you are interested in learning more about SAP solutions for Governance, Risk, and Compliance, feel free to fill-in the demo request form!

entry.title: Re: SAP ECTR for SAP S/4HANA 1.2 - What’s new in the new major Release
entry.content:
Hi Team,

we have performed the SPS update on one of the SAP PLM Quality system after that we are  getting the ABAP programming error dume realted to DATA_OFFSET_NEGATIVE   

 

Below is the dump

==

Category ABAP programming error
Runtime Errors DATA_OFFSET_NEGATIVE
Except. CX_SY_RANGE_OUT_OF_BOUNDS
ABAP Program SAPLCV120
Application Component CA-DMS
Date and Time 01.07.2024 12:48:31

 

Short Text
Invalid subfield access: Offset negative

 

What happened?
Error in the ABAP application program.

The current ABAP program "SAPLCV120" had to be terminated because it found a
statement that could not be executed.

entry.title: Re: Fetching text from API_PRODUCT_SRV - Filter/key not working in Abap cloud call
entry.content:
Hi all,

Well, in the end we got it working but we decided to take this specific route: 

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/service-consumption-model-2-for-odata-client-proxy/ba-p/13573733

It is the service consumption model. 

I used this in the past and somehow I never got a entityset in my list on the left when I used a specific API with some stock info. Later on I discovered that the functions weren't available to us. Tried another api with api_product_srv an there you go, all the entities we needed. Followed the guide and that was it, works perfectly.

Cheers!

Laurens

entry.title: Load method (BAPI/ FM/ IDOC) to migrate WBS element Budget data
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We have a requirement to migrate WBS budget (including original budget, supplement, return, transfer, actual, plan data) cost posting from ERP system to S/4HANA. The table involved is RPSCO.

We are looking for a BAPI/ FM/ IDOC to migrate the data. 

Any lead to it would be appreciated.

Thank you so much in advance.

 

SAP Data Services FIN Cost Object Controlling ABAP Development SAP S/4HANA Cloud Data Migration

entry.title: Re: Restriction BP transaction (by BP Grouping)
entry.content:
@at-MartinS With this Standard object 'B_BUPA_GRP' ,you define which business partners can be edited on the basis of the authorization group. It does not help in restricting the access while creating the BP.

 

***This object is not needed if there is  special protection required for master data

entry.title: Ask the Speakers | SAP Inside Track Bengaluru 2024 - Business AI Edition
entry.content:
SAP Inside Track 2024 - Business AI Edition's agenda is live!!!

Do you have questions for our Speakers? 

Here is what you can do 👇

- Go to www.sitblr.in 
- Find the topics that interest you from the following tracks

  • Track 1 - General SAP BTP and Other Products
  • Track 2 - Development Pro Code + Low Code
  • Track 3 - Data & Analytics + Integration
  • Track 4 - Artificial Intelligence + Automation
  • Track 5 - SAP UI5, Fiori, and Design
  • Track 6 - Concur
  • Track 7 - SAP (SF, CX)

- Return back to this post. 
- @tag the speakers and drop a question that you want them to address during the session.

entry.title: Upcoming Webinar: What's New in SAP Customer Checkout 2.0 FP19 & FP20
entry.content:
Hello,

keeping up with market trends is crucial in today's retail, sports and entertainment, and catering businesses. Continous development and enhancement of POS software are essential to stay up to date. 

We're happy to share with you our upcoming webinar 'What's New in SAP Customer Checkout 2.0 FP19 & FP20':

Date: July 25, 2024

Time: 1:30 - 2:30pm CET

Our SAP Customer Checkout experts will introduce you to the latest features of the new versions - covering both - SAP Customer Checkout, and the SAP Customer Checkout manager. You will also have the opportunity to ask any question you may have.

REGISTER HERE for the webinar.

We are looking forward to having you in this webinar!

Best regards,

Elena Vavitsa

Marketing Lead for SAP Customer Checkout

entry.title: Improving pricing performance in volume industries using the SAP Price Staging Hub by Vistex
entry.content:
Introduction 

In today's wholesale distribution industry, pricing has become a crucial topic. With the rise of online marketplaces and less loyal buyers, there is increased price transparency. At the same time, growing assortments, faster vendor price updates, and the importance of customer-specific pricing have led to a high volume of pricing information. Distributors now face challenges in maintaining prices, providing accurate customer-specific pricing across all channels in a performant way, and updating prices quickly. 

Furthermore, as the web-shop gains more importance, especially in industrial wholesale, customers using the web-shop expect to see their specific prices at all stages of browsing. However, the current method of calling the ERP backend synchronously to calculate the customer price leads to high load on the ERP system and potential waiting times for web-shop users. This is particularly challenging for high-volume industries such as wholesale distribution. 

To address these issues, SAP, in partnership with Vistex, has developed the SAP Price Staging Hub. This solution, based on the Business Technology Platform (BTP), provides pre-calculated prices for high-pricing volumes across distributed landscapes. It enables businesses to define and selectively process pricing-related changes, efficiently generating current price information and distributing time-sensitive customer-specific price data. The stored price data is easily accessible and can be consumed by other applications. Both push and pull scenarios for price publishing are possible. 

 Addressed Use Cases  

SAP Price Staging Hub by Vistex is designed to address several use cases: 

  1. E-commerce – highly efficient response to a large volume of simultaneous synchronous pricing requests from the web-shop for individual prices 
  1. Price Catalog – efficient generation of customer price catalogs, whether through scheduled tasks or manual requests 
  1. Requests from 3rd party applications – highly efficient response to significant amount of parallel synchronous pricing calls from external systems, such as pharmacy POS systems 

 Solution Overview 

SAP Price Staging Hub by Vistex is a BTP-based solution providing pre-calculated prices across distributed landscapes for very high pricing volumes.  

The solution provides businesses the ability to define and selectively process pricing-related changes, schedules and executes price calculations as needed, and stores the pre-determined prices for fast retrieval. It generates full or delta catalogs of final prices and publishes the predetermined prices to other systems. 

Solution in detail: 

Price data, business partner and material APIs deliver master data to the Price Staging Hub. Pricing procedures are replicated from SAP S/4HANA or SAP Business Suite.  

  1. Population 
    Price-related master data—including customer, product and price conditions—is fed to Price Staging Hub from the pricing source-of-truth.  This may be SAP S/4HANA or SAP Business Suite or another price management solution such as SAP Data Maintenance for S/4HANA by Vistex, pricing option or SAP Extended Price Management by Vistex.  Initially, a calculation of all relevant prices is executed, and the calculated prices are stored. 

  2. Detection of price changes 
    Re-determination of prices happens only when customer, product, and price conditions are changed. Price Staging Hub monitors price-related master data in the source system for changes that should trigger price re-determination. 

  3. Calculation 
    Price Staging Hub executes price re-calculations where needed, based on above mentioned master data changes, on a frequent schedule—measured in minutes or hours, not daily or weekly. 

  4. Price staging 
    Price Staging Hub stores the pre-determined prices and makes them readily available for: 
    - fast fetching via API (pull-scenario) by other solutions, 
    - publishing predetermined prices to other systems (push-scenario), 
    - generation of full or delta customer price catalogs.  

 Customer Value 

Implementing the SAP Price Staging Hub by Vistex offers several customer benefits. It improves the customer experience in the web-shop by showing individualized prices during browsing and in search result lists, with fast response times. It allows businesses to handle increasing transaction volumes on their web-shops over the next years. By providing current and accurate prices in real-time, it increases cart and RFQ conversion ratios. The processing times for creating and distributing customer price catalogs can be significantly reduced. 

Resources

Solution Brief – SAP Price Staging Hub by Vistex

entry.title: Queries around Cloud ready mode in sap MDG on S4 HANA 2023
entry.content:
Hello All,

 

Our system is being upgraded to S/4 Hana 2023 on premise. We are planning to implement a Cloud Ready Mode for Business partner (Customer and Supplier). I do have a few queries about it.

 

  1. Currently we are using Ariba SLP for onboarding Suppliers. Is MDG Cloud Ready Mode supports Ariba SLP integration?
  2. How derivation and validation across entity types works in Cloud-ready mode. Do single-entity and across-entity Badis (USMD_RULE_SERVICE) are supported in Cloud-ready mode?
  3. In Automation workflow can system trigger the validation at request submission stage, or a separate step would be required in the workflow? In the current process (Rube base workflow) it does the validation at the Change Request submission stage.
  4. How can we enable a set of fields at each workflow steps (e.g. four level of approvers) in automation workflow?
  5. Can you please provide the product (Material) release date for support in Cloud Ready Mode?
  6. In product/Material Cloud Ready Mode- Is classic classification will be supported for material class (001) in classic mode?

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Master Data   @0012anirban @Mark63  @Rahul15 

 

Thanks

Rahul Khandelwal
